article_title: Envoy Medical Reports First Patients Reaching 12-Month Endpoint in Pivotal Trial of Fully Implanted Cochlear Implant

content_preview.title: Envoy Medical Reports First Patients Reaching 12-Month Endpoint in Pivotal Trial of Fully Implanted Cochlear Implant
content_preview.summary: Three participants in the Acclaim cochlear implant trial have completed their primary 12-month evaluations, bringing the first fully implanted cochlear implant closer to FDA submission.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Envoy Medical announced on April 1 that the first three participants in its pivotal clinical trial of the Acclaim cochlear implant have [successfully completed their 12-month endpoint evaluations](https://www.envoymedical.com/news/envoy-medical-announces-first-patients-successfully-reaching-12-month-endpoint-in-pivotal-clinical-trial-for-fully-implanted-cochlear-implant). The milestone marks a critical step toward a Premarket Approval (PMA) application to the U.S. Food and Drug Admi...
